hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams automatically generate and route cases from alerts and risk signals to improve review efficiency and preserve audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case creation depends on manual interpretation
problem_description: Compliance teams spend excessive time manually reviewing alerts and routing cases, creating delays and inconsistencies in investigation workflows. This fragmented approach weakens audit readiness and complicates traceability across provider outputs and internal decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider alerts, risk signals and exception data into structured cases with routed workflows, decision logs and preserved evidence to accelerate compliance reviews and support audit readiness.
workflow_title: From alerts and checks to cases
workflow_description: SFTY processes provider alerts and risk signals by routing reviews, opening cases, capturing decisions and preserving evidence for structured compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One case automation layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns isolated risk signals and provider outputs into automated cases with connected decisions, evidence and audit-ready workflows tailored for VASP compliance operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations by connecting provider outputs into audit-ready cases with evidence preservation and controlled workflows for bank due diligence and enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support automatic case creation from alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how alerts and risk signals trigger case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved in case files
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs are routed into compliance cases
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY automate case creation workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY applies internal compliance rules to automatically create, route and assign cases from alerts and risk signals, reducing manual workload and speeding review for VASP operations.
faq_2_question: How are provider outputs routed into cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into structured cases using configurable rules and policies, supporting consistent and auditable workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in a controlled environment to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing provider systems and connects their outputs into connected workflows without requiring replacement or duplication of current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, or other providers but integrates their outputs into one operational compliance layer for streamlined case management.
final_title: Connect alerts to automated case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY routes risk signals into structured cases with decision logs and audit-ready evidence for VASP compliance operations.
